title: Global Action Plan for the Steppe Eagle
description: Source: DTE Subject: Environment Context: The Global Action Plan (GAP) for the Steppe Eagle (2026–2035) was officially adopted during CMS COP15, which concluded, in Campo Grande, Brazil.
